pluginDescription: Built-in FT8/FT4 standard QSO automation strategy
strategyOverviewDesc: This strategy plugin drives the standard FT8/FT4 QSO flow, including auto reply, target selection, timeout handling, and retry behavior.
autoReplyToCQDesc: When listening, answer eligible CQ callers automatically. Useful for unattended hunting; leave it off when you want to choose every station yourself.
autoResumeCQAfterFailDesc: If a call goes unanswered for several rounds, return to calling CQ instead of staying on a dead QSO attempt.
autoResumeCQAfterSuccessDesc: After the 73 is sent, go back to CQ automatically. Good for running; turn it off if you want to review the log or retune after each QSO.
replyToWorkedStationsDesc: Answer direct callers even if their callsign is already in your log. Handy for band/mode fills; keep it off for strict duplicate avoidance.
distinguishWorkedStationsByBandDesc: When enabled, only callsigns worked on the current band count as worked. When disabled, a callsign worked on any band counts as worked, including CQ auto replies.
skipTx1Desc: When you initiate a call to a CQ station, send the signal report first instead of your grid. Similar to JTDX Skip TX1; saves one cycle but the other station may not see your grid.
